primary_break_reason: Stage 3 produced 25 candidates and restored 6 sources, but the candidate set only reaches wrapper-level upload enumeration and parameter assembly APIs such as MultiPartRequestWrapper.getFileParameterNames/getFileNames/getFiles and Map.put. The code's obvious file or path exposure points such as UploadedFile.getAbsolutePath, UploadedFile.getContent, StrutsUploadedFile.getAbsolutePath, StrutsUploadedFile.getContent, and FileUploadAction.setUpload(File) never appear in the candidate set, so the LLM never had a sink-shaped target to label; MySinks.qll therefore stays at 1 = 0.
